name: auth-clerk
description:
Clerk hosted auth — alternative to better-auth. FREE up to 10,000 monthly active users (MAU); paid plans from $25/mo + $0.02/MAU above 10k. Drop-in <SignInButton /> + <UserButton /> components, social providers via dashboard, organizations + RBAC built-in.

Trade-off vs better-auth: faster to ship (5 min), polished UI out-of-box, BUT users live on Clerk's servers — exporting later requires Clerk's data export API. Pick this when (a) you need to ship a paid product fast, (b) <10k MAU is plausible, (c) you don't want to build sign-in UI yourself.

Mutually exclusive with auth-better-auth — pick ONE.
post_install_steps: Sign up at https://clerk.com (free up to 10k MAU)
Create an application; copy Publishable Key + Secret Key
